This USB connector only provides the
basic USB2.0 data signals. They are
protected with TVS diodes right at
Export the USB data signals from this sheet,
as well as all the power lines (power lines
are global symbols, so exporting them is not
The incoming VBUS power first goes through a TVS diode to protect the board
from transient voltages from the cable. Next, a fuse and zener diode work
together to protect against permanent overvoltages: the zener shorts to GND
Finally, chip AP2141WG-7 only lets 500mA pass through. In case of overcurrent,
it will pull down its FLG pin which then lights up a red LED.
Provide plenty of capacitors on the 5V line.
The capacitors below are placed just after
